li.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[ recipeMaker and ( weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"MG")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"MachineGun")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"LMG")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"HMG")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"Launcher")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"RocketLauncher")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"GrenadeLauncher")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"Spacer")] or weaponTags/li[text()="GrenadeDestructive"] or weaponTags/li[text()="GrenadeEMP"] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"AMR")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"AntiMaterial")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"AntiMateriel")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"HeavyWeapon")] ) ]/recipeMaker/recipeUsers

Defs/ThingDef[ recipeMaker and ( weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"MG")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"MachineGun")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"LMG")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"HMG")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"Launcher")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"RocketLauncher")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"GrenadeLauncher")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"Spacer")] or weaponTags/li[text()="GrenadeDestructive"] or weaponTags/li[text()="GrenadeEMP"] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"AMR")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"AntiMaterial")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"AntiMateriel")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"HeavyWeapon")] ) ]/recipeMaker

Defs/ThingDef[ recipeMaker and not(recipeMaker/recipeUsers/li[text()="RNBench_HeavyWeapons"]) and ( weaponTags/li[text()="Pistol"] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"Pistol")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"Revolver")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"SMG")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"PDW")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"Shotgun")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"ShortShells")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"Carbine")] ) ]/recipeMaker/recipeUsers

Defs/ThingDef[ recipeMaker and not(recipeMaker/recipeUsers/li[text()="RNBench_HeavyWeapons"]) and ( weaponTags/li[text()="Pistol"] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"Pistol")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"Revolver")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"SMG")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"PDW")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"Shotgun")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"ShortShells")] or weaponTags/li[contains(text(),"Carbine")] ) ]/recipeMaker
Defs/ThingDef[ recipeMaker and weaponTags and not(recipeMaker/recipeUsers/li[text()="RNBench_HeavyWeapons"]) and not(recipeMaker/recipeUsers/li[text()="RNBench_CQB"]) ]/recipeMaker/recipeUsers
Defs/ThingDef[ recipeMaker and weaponTags and not(recipeMaker/recipeUsers/li[text()="RNBench_HeavyWeapons"]) and not(recipeMaker/recipeUsers/li[text()="RNBench_CQB"]) ]/recipeMaker
